# discord_guild (Data Source)

Fetches a Discord guild by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_guild" "current" {
  id = var.guild_id
}

output "guild_name" {
  value = data.discord_guild.current.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Guild ID (snowflake).

### Read-Only

- `features` (List of String) List of guild feature flags (e.g. `COMMUNITY`, `VERIFIED`).
- `icon` (String) Hash of the guild's icon, or empty if no icon is set.
- `name` (String) Guild name.
- `owner_id` (String) User ID of the guild owner.
